subcodes.first_line: O thou incomparable plant in the garden of the love of God! Give thanks unto God that thou wert planted in this meadow
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نهال بیهمال ریاض محبت الله حمد کن خدا را که در این جویبار رحمانی غرس شدی
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
